productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Duramo 4 Lea White Sports Shoes
description: Formidable performance and high-end style meet in these adidas Duramo 4 shoes for men. Both comfortable and durable, these everyday runners feature the signature adiPRENE® cushioning technology and a tough adiWEAR® outsole to withstand wear and tear on rough terrains.UpperLeather uppers with synthetic overlays for maximum comfort and styleLace-ups for better FitIconic three stripes symbolizing the challenges that are seen ahead and goals that can be achieved on the sidesPadded collar and tongue and textile shoe lining for better comfortMidsoleCushioned footbed for all day comfortLitestrike EVA midsole for better shock absorption and cushioningadiPrene delivers supreme forefoot cushioningadiPrene under the heel for superior cushioning at impactOutsoleadiWear outsole offers the ultimate high-wear durabilityScooped out heel gives better cushioning of the heel from shockImpact guidance system enables better motion of the feetFlex grooves provide better flexibity to the feetShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
